title: The Lively Learned Lobster
content:
The Lively Learned Lobster,
    who mended his own Clothes with
    a Needle and Thread.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Lively Learned Lobster"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
